scope.name: MERGE_LEGITIMACY_CLOSURE_AUDIT
scope.purpose: Define the closure audit that verifies lineage continuity across the entire merge governance topology. The audit classifies lineage state — it does not create legitimacy.

required_inputs.sco_valid_hash_note: sco_valid_hash must be present when SCO governance applies. When SCO governance does not apply, sco_valid_hash must be explicitly null. It must never be absent from the audit input set.

rules.MERGE_LEGITIMACY_OPEN: Use when any required input hash is absent. Missing required artifacts mean the chain is open.
rules.RECONCILIATION_INCOMPLETE: Use only when required evidence exists but deterministic replay or reconciliation cannot be completed.
rules.LINEAGE_DIVERGENCE: Use when required evidence exists but lineage fields disagree — gate artifacts bind to different head_sha values.
rules.PROOF_LINEAGE_MISMATCH: Use when MERGE_PROOF does not bind to the same lineage validated by upstream gates — gate hashes in the proof diverge from individually audited gate hashes.
rules.MERGE_LEGITIMACY_CLOSED: Full lineage chain reconciles: all gate hashes present, internally consistent, and bound to the same validated_head_sha and merge_commit_sha.

lineage_closure_hash.semantics: Stable hash of lineage inputs only. Same lineage_closure_hash with a different audit_record_hash means the same lineage state was audited in a new instance.

audit_record_hash.semantics: Hash of the full audit record including audited_at. Different audit_record_hash with the same lineage_closure_hash means a new audit instance for the same lineage state.

hashing_model.algorithm: SHA-256 over deterministic JSON canonicalization with sorted keys

pre_hash_guard.rule: Before computing hashes, the audit engine must verify: all required lineage inputs are present, all required metadata fields are present, all non_operability flags are explicitly false.
pre_hash_guard.incomplete_input_result: no closure hash, no closure claim

MERGE_LEGITIMACY_CLOSURE_REPORT.note: lineage_closure_hash is omitted when pre-hash guard fails — no closure hash, no closure claim.

outputs.governance_gap_inventory: List of missing governance links detected during the audit.
outputs.unresolved_dependency_inventory: List of unresolved dependencies blocking lineage closure.
outputs.stage4_readiness_classification: One of: READY_FOR_STAGE4, GOVERNANCE_GAPS_REMAIN, DRIFT_DETECTED, BYPASS_PATH_PRESENT

boundary_rule.statement: Closure audit classifies lineage state. It does not create legitimacy.

canonical_compression.rule_2: Merge legitimacy exists only when the full governance chain reconciles.
canonical_compression.rule_6: Closure audit classifies lineage state. It does not create legitimacy.

deterministic_artifact.rule: Identical lineage inputs must produce an identical lineage_closure_hash. The audit_record_hash incorporates audited_at and may differ across audit instances for the same lineage state.
